heading: BSON.ObjectId
body:
The `BSON.ObjectId` type represents a 12-byte MongoDB `ObjectId`
identifier.

Constructs a `BSON.ObjectId` object that encodes an
[ObjectId](manual/reference/method/ObjectId)

```typescript
new BSON.ObjectId(id: string)
```

| Parameter | Type   | Description                                                  |
| --------- | ------ | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| id        | string | Optional. A 12-byte string or a string of 24 hex characters. |
